lead.description: [ Skip to content](https://startupnv.org/#content "Skip to content") [ ![](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/startupnv-horiz-white-1024x434.png) ](https://startupnv.org) [ ](https://startupnv.org/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjEzODczIiwidG9nZ2xlIjpmYWxzZX0%3D) * | Email Now info@startupnv.org # Building Nevada's Startup Ecosystem We have 7 growth programs for founders and 4 affiliated funds to support startup growth. [ I'm a startup ](https://startupnv.org/startups/services/) [ I'm an Investor ](https://startupnv.org/investors/) **By Founders, For Founders.** StartUpNV was founded by successful entrepreneurs who know the impact that a supportive startup ecosystem makes in a startup’s success. Our organization is built on ensuring Nevada’s founders have access to the best resources, support, and capital (with founder-friendly deal terms) right here at home. In doing so, we help diversify Nevada’s economy, create jobs, build community, and keep and attract the best innovators to build their StartUp(in)NV. Interested in learning more from StartUpNV? [Join our Newsletter!](https://share.hsforms.com/1rvw9VvbrQS6ieLzkkQr1aA1em26) ### Helping Entrepreneurs since 2017 Since June 2017 Entreprenuers Educated 0 + Pitches Heard 0 + Mentors 0 + Investors Educated 0 + #### Nevada’s Statewide Startup Incubator & Accelerator **Incubator Programs** StartUpNV supports the lifecycle of entrepreneurship throughout Nevada, at every stage. Our incubator programs help entrepreneurs develop and scale ideas from MVP to revenue-producing businesses. **Accelerator Programs** Startups that are accepted to our AccelerateNV program receive an investment from affiliated fund, FundNV, and are provided the tools and resources to accelerate the growth of your company to raise additional capital. FundNV and 1864 are active investment funds. FundNV is a pre-seed stage fund that focuses solely on Nevada based businesses that will grow jobs in our state. The 1864 Fund is a seed stage fund that goes beyond the state of Nevada to the forgotten middle of our country, typically from the intermountain states to the Mississippi and south. If your company is based in the western coastal states 1864 Fund may consider your application, or the [Sierra Angels](http://www.sierraangels.com) are a good starting place. [ pitch your startup ](https://1em26.share.hsforms.com/239PsK5dxSPCNBUWXX9DLaw) ![companies get pre seed funding investors at Angel NV Conference 4](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/companies-get-funding-at-Angel-NV-Conference-4.jpg) ![group of people having a good time nevada angel investors 111](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/group-of-people-having-a-good-time-111.jpg) AngelNV3 Investors' Happy Hour ### Ready to Learn How to Invest in Startups? StartUpNV is a non-profit organization, but the venture funds we facilitate are very much for-profit. They’re committed to attracting and raising venture capital in Nevada, educating and reducing barriers to becoming an investor, and making informed investments in the next big disruptors. [ Get Started ](https://startupnv.org/investors) **Angel Investing** Part of StartUpNV’s mission is to educate individuals on what it takes to be a good angel investor and how to make smart, successful investments. The right investors and mentors can make all the difference in a startup’s success, and being an early investor in the right companies can provide the greatest returns. Learn more at [www.angelnv.com](http://www.angelnv.com) **Venture Funds** StartUpNV’s affiliated funds have investment committees consisting of exited founders, long-time angel investors and seasoned venture capitalists, and our unique model allows our venture team to spend months to years getting to know founders and their businesses before investing. Visit [fundnv.com](http://www.fundnv.com), [1864.Fund](http://www.1864.fund) and [AngelNV.com](http://www.angelnv.com) to learn more. Interested in hearing more about StartUpNV? [Join our newsletter!](https://1em26.share.hsforms.com/2iGlIBZjGQ4ufYw8AVzBcXg) [ Need Software Development? TechDevNV is a Full-Service, Comprehensive Software Development And Consultancy House Get Started ](https://startupnv.org/techdevnv/) [ Upcoming StartupNV Events StartUpNV has a myriad of events geared towards entrepreneurs and founders- join us at a Pitch Day, or level up your startup game at a Master Glass Speaker event! Click Here ](https://startupnv.org/event/) [ Valuation Calculator Discover how valuations are assigned based on total market size and capture, and what sales are necessary to validate a valuation. Try it now! ](https://startupnv.org/how-to-use-a-valuation-tool/) ### **Why StartUpNV?** * We engage with startups at every stage of the journey. * We know that it takes a village, or rather an ecosystem, and we’re building it. * We believe that entrepreneurship is for the brave, not the privileged. * We do the ultimate diligence. * We have a ton of fun. [ About Us ](https://startupnv.org/about/) [ ![](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/flawless-logo-black.png) ](http://flawless.ai) [ ![](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/tensorwaveblack-1024x536.png) ](http://tensorwave.com) [ ![](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/07/daicai.png) ](https://daic.ai/) [ View all StartUpNV Portfolio Companies ](https://startupnv.org/investments) [![](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/2312-01-1-Leveraging-ESO-Support-1000x625c-768x480.webp)](https://startupnv.org/how-ai-is-transforming-startups-essential-tools-strategies-for-founders/) ### [ How AI is Transforming Startups: Essential Tools & Strategies for Founders ](https://startupnv.org/how-ai-is-transforming-startups-essential-tools-strategies-for-founders/) [ Read More » ](https://startupnv.org/how-ai-is-transforming-startups-essential-tools-strategies-for-founders/) [![](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/12/DSC04155-768x512.jpg)](https://startupnv.org/the-secret-to-building-a-strong-advisory-board/) ### [ The Secret to Building a strong advisory board ](https://startupnv.org/the-secret-to-building-a-strong-advisory-board/) [ Read More » ](https://startupnv.org/the-secret-to-building-a-strong-advisory-board/) [![](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/07/July-Storytelling-Blog-768x434.png)](https://startupnv.org/mastering-the-art-of-startup-storytelling-how-to-win-investors-and-customers/) ### [ Mastering the Art of Startup Storytelling: How to Win Investors and Customers ](https://startupnv.org/mastering-the-art-of-startup-storytelling-how-to-win-investors-and-customers/) [ Read More » ](https://startupnv.org/mastering-the-art-of-startup-storytelling-how-to-win-investors-and-customers/) ![](https://startupnv.org/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/startupnv-horiz-navy-2-1024x435.png) We are Nevada’s statewide startup accelerator & incubator. We enable entrepreneurs to develop and scale ideas.
